displayName.description: The display name of the user.

400.description: The request was malformed or invalid.

401.description: The provided authentication credentials were invalid.

403.description: The authenticated user does not have permission to access the requested resource.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

413.description: The request payload is too large.

500.description: An internal server error occurred. Look at the server logs for more details.
